structural_assertions.coverage_note: Access-typed constant initialization still lowers to explicit dereference writes plus explicit cleanup support.
Constant-derived channel capacity remains visible in the emitted protected buffer shape and entry guards.
Defaulted discriminants in the current boolean-only subset emit as explicit discriminated Ada records.
spec_fragments: type default_result (active : boolean := True) is record

structural_assertions.coverage_note: Constant-derived scalar range bounds remain explicit in emitted subtype and constant declarations.
Shadowed mutable locals stay distinct from outer constants in the emitted Ada body.
Task priorities derived from constants remain explicit in the emitted task declaration without dragging unrelated task-body proof noise into the corpus.
Procedure-only emission stays support-file-light and preserves explicit dependency contracts.
Record-only emission stays support-file-light and preserves the intended minimal package skeleton.
Result equality and inequality lowering remain explicit and compile/prove cleanly in emitted Ada.
Guarded result access now proves on top of explicit boolean-discriminant variant record emission.
spec_fragments: type parse_result (ok : boolean := False) is record

structural_assertions.coverage_note: Loop-carried wide arithmetic and narrowing remain explicit in the emitted accumulation path.
Wide-to-narrow conversion and sign-sensitive narrowing remain explicit and asserted before return.
Return-path arithmetic stays widened and narrowed explicitly, including negative constant returns.
Index-safe midpoint search remains explicit through loop variants, midpoint asserts, and bounded index conversions.
Whole-range iteration over bounded indices remains direct and safe in the emitted loops.
Lookup lowering keeps explicit raw-id range guards before index narrowing and table access.
Matrix trace and transpose keep bounded multidimensional indexing and explicit transposition assignments.

body_fragments: for i in first .. last loop
structural_assertions.coverage_note: Subrange iteration remains explicit through guarded bounds and direct in-range element access across the selected slice.
Division-by-constant lowering remains explicit and range-asserted before narrowing the result.
Modulo lowering stays explicit for both fixed divisor and size-parameterized ring indexing.
Percentage computation keeps the total-nonzero guard and explicit widened multiply/divide shape.
Remainder lowering and parity testing remain explicit, bounded, and prove-clean.

body_fragments: if ((A /= null) and then (B /= null)) then
structural_assertions.coverage_note: Conditional access dereference stays guarded by explicit null checks on both pointers.
Not-null access parameters still lower to direct dereference reads and writes without extra null-guard noise.
source_fragments: type data_ptr is not null access data;
spec_fragments: type data_ptr is not null access data;

body_fragments: return new sensor_data'(id => id, value => initial_value);
structural_assertions.coverage_note: Allocator-based factory returns and later field dereference remain explicit in the emitted body.
Linked-list traversal keeps structural loop variants and observer-style pointer progression in emitted Ada.
Optional access values stay guarded through explicit null tests on read and presence-check paths.
